articles.description: Union Minister Piyush Goyal said seat-sharing discussions within the NDA for the upcoming Tamil Nadu Assembly elections would be finalised today, as negotiations entered a decisive phase in Chennai.

dailyNews.description: Princess Diana allegedly prepared Prince Harry to be king, calling him "Good King Harry" as Prince William seemed reluctant to take the throne, her friend Richard Kay claimed.

dailyNews.title: No tips, worse service? Restaurant owners warn trend is 'degrading' dining experience
dailyNews.description: Restaurant owners debate the no-tip dining trend, with some saying transparent pricing helps diners, while others warn about degrading service and lost profits.

dailyNews.description: As President Donald Trump signals possible action, experts say Cuba has no clear successor while Raúl Castro, 94, remains a significant influence on the communist country.

dailyNews.description: Border czar Tom Homan pushed back at CNN's Dana Bash after she questioned how "well-thought-out" a plan to deploy ICE officers to assist TSA agents could be.

dailyNews.description: A federal judge overturned Pentagon press restrictions that evicted major news outlets, ruling the policy violated First Amendment press freedom rights.

dailyNews.description: The statue of the explorer, a replica of one that protesters toppled in 2020, was placed outside the Eisenhower Executive Office Building.

dailyNews.title: When Voters Worry About ‘Affordability,’ Many Point to Health Care
dailyNews.description: Democrats have had limited political success running on the Affordable Care Act, even with its relative popularity. Now President Trump’s health care cuts may have given the issue new resonance.

dailyNews.title: How Obama’s Strategist Discouraged Biden From Running in 2016
dailyNews.description: In a new set of oral histories, David Plouffe, President Barack Obama’s political adviser, described how he urged Vice President Joseph R. Biden Jr. not to challenge Hillary Clinton for the nomination.

dailyNews.title: Iran unswayed by Trump's 48-hour deadline and threats to 'obliterate' energy infrastructure
dailyNews.description: Iran has threatened to escalate strikes on energy infrastructure should President Donald Trump make good on a promise to “obliterate” the country’s power plants if it does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz. NBC News’ Matt Bradley reports from Tel Aviv, Israel.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin. to send ICE agents to assist TSA at airports
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration says ICE agents will deploy to airports across the country on Monday to assist TSA officers with security at airport entrances and exits where lines have been particularly long in recent weeks. NBC News’ Julie Tsirkin reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump places statue of Christopher Columbus near the White House
dailyNews.description: ANNAPOLIS, Md. — A statue of Christopher Columbus has been placed on the grounds of the Eisenhower Executive Office Building adjacent to the White House, the latest effort by President Donald Trump’s administration to recognize the controversial explorer

dailyNews.title: Here's the biggest news you missed this weekend
dailyNews.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent on Sunday defended U.S. and Israeli strikes on Iran’s infrastructure, saying “sometimes you have to escalate to de-escalate.”His comments came just hours after President Donald Trump wrote on Truth Social that he was giving Iranian leadership 48 hours to open the Strait of Hormuz or risk strikes that “will hit and obliterate their various POWER PLANTS, STARTING WITH THE BIGGEST ONE FIRST!”Bessent defended Trump’s rhetoric, saying it’s “the only la

dailyNews.title: Tom Homan says ICE agents will assist at airport security points amid TSA staffing shortages
dailyNews.description: The White House border czar said agents will deploy to airports across the country Monday to assist TSA officers with security at airport entrances and exits where lines have been particularly long in recent weeks.

dailyNews.title: Iran defies Trump's Strait of Hormuz ultimatum with threats of its own
dailyNews.description: Iran answers Trump's threat to "obliterate" power plants with matching warnings and a missile barrage, including its longest-range attack yet targeting a U.S. base.

dailyNews.title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz will be "completely closed" if Trump delivers on threats
dailyNews.description: The president threatened to "obliterate" Iranian power plants if Iran didn't reopen the Strait of Hormuz by late Monday night Eastern Daylight Time.

dailyNews.title: Trump calling in ICE agents for airport security as DHS shutdown continues
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration says ICE officers will be stationed at hotspot U.S. airports starting Monday to assist with TSA screenings. They will undergo some training before then. Skyler Henry reports.

dailyNews.title: The American rare earths company seeking to topple China's dominance | 60 Minutes
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is working with a U.S. company to challenge China's dominance over rare earth elements. The metals are essential for components in smartphones, robotics, fighter jets, and drones.
